title: Animated Redstone
body:
# Animated Redstone
This adds a pulsing animation to all powered redstone.

Yeah, that's all.

...

Oh, here's a preview:

## Preview
![Preview of the redstone ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o7D1mN4v/images/98d1b7cc6d1147e8217a747db306673066e8684b.gif)
I know redstone ores aren't technically "powered", but they have that kind of glow, so I made an exception.
